questions: How does GH #196 Surface-tag enforcement affect qor-logic systems independently?
How does it affect qor-logic together with the FailSafe application?

findings.claim: Schema-optional additive WARN-first capability extension; not a behavior change to any existing gate.
Zero effect on qor-logic own seal: no docs/FEATURE_INDEX.md, disclosed-skips whole pass.
Parser header-driven and tolerates extra columns; coupled change is feature_index.schema.json surface property.
FailSafe owns data (FailSafe#206); qor-logic owns gate; no runtime coupling.
Cross-repo: V2 fail-closed must wait for FailSafe full surface coverage or its seal breaks.
DRIFT: governance_health treats FEATURE_INDEX required vs doctrine optional (separable follow-on).
